# Yellow Sticker — for people and automated tools reading a short site summary

# Site
https://yellowsticker.uk/

# Name
Yellow Sticker

# What we are
Yellow Sticker is a UK subscription service that watches official West End theatre box office pages for same-day standing ticket availability. We email or Telegram you the moment standing tickets appear; you buy from the venue’s real checkout at the same public price. We are not the box office or a ticket resale market.

# Where
West End / London theatre, per production you choose to track.

# Price
£2 per month per production (or a one-month option), cancel anytime; money-back if we find no standing tickets in a paid period per our guarantee.

# Key pages
- Home: https://yellowsticker.uk/
- FAQs: https://yellowsticker.uk/faq

# Contact
See the website footer and emails from our service.
